Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Communication, empathy, training, stakeholder management, psychology.
• Qualifications: Consulting skills; Prosci certification is very common.

Job Description: An external expert who advises organizations on their Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) strategy and programs.
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct DEI assessments (analyzing demographic data, running focus groups).
• Develop a multi-year DEI strategic roadmap.
• Design and deliver training on topics like unconscious bias.
• Advise on creating Employee Resource Groups (ERGs) and equitable hiring practices.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep subject matter expertise in DEI, facilitation, data analysis, sensitivity, communication.
• Qualifications: Background in HR, Law, or Sociology. DEI certifications.

Job Description: A consultant who manages Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO). The consulting firm takes over all or part of a client's internal recruiting function.
Key Responsibilities:
• Manage the end-to-end hiring process for a client company.
• Source, screen, and interview candidates on behalf of the client.
• Work with client hiring managers to define roles and scorecards.
• Implement new recruiting technologies (ATS) and processes.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Full-cycle recruiting, stakeholder management, sourcing, ATS knowledge.
• Qualifications: Extensive background as a corporate recruiter or agency recruiter.

Job Description: A data-driven consultant who helps organizations analyze their current workforce and forecast future talent needs (what skills they need, where, and when).
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze current workforce demographics, skills, and turnover data.
• Build statistical models to forecast future talent supply and demand.
• Identify future skills gaps based on the business strategy.
• Develop strategic plans (build, buy, or borrow talent) to fill those gaps.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Data analysis, statistical modeling (Python/R), HR analytics, strategic planning.
• Qualifications: Background in data science, finance, or HR analytics.

Job Description: A high-level consultant who advises clients on the design of their end-to-end supply chain network, from sourcing raw materials to final-mile delivery.
Key Responsibilities:
• Design the client's physical network (location of factories, warehouses).
• Develop inventory strategies (e.g., Just-in-Time vs. Just-in-Case).
• Analyze supply chain risks and build resilience strategies.
• Align the supply chain model with the overall business strategy.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Supply chain management, network modeling, inventory theory, operations strategy.
• Qualifications: Degree in Engineering, Operations, or Supply Chain. MBA often required.

Job Description: A specialist who advises clients on how to buy materials and services more strategically, focusing on cost reduction and risk management.
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze client spending across all categories (direct and indirect).
• Develop strategic sourcing plans for key commodity groups.
• Run large-scale RFP events and negotiate with global suppliers.
• Implement new procurement processes and technologies (e.g., Ariba).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Strategic sourcing, negotiation, supplier relationship management (SRM), data analysis.
• Qualifications: Experience in corporate procurement or supply chain.

Job Description: Focuses specifically on the transportation and warehousing part of the supply chain, helping clients move and store goods more efficiently.
Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize transportation routes and carrier networks (freight, ocean, air).
• Advise on warehouse design, layout, and automation (robotics).
• Implement Warehouse Management Systems (WMS).
• Conduct freight cost benchmarking and carrier negotiations.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Logistics planning, WMS/TMS software, network optimization, freight markets.
• Qualifications: Degree in Logistics or Supply Chain Management.

Job Description: A management consultant specializing in the healthcare industry. Advises hospital systems, insurers (payers), or pharmaceutical companies on strategy.
Key Responsibilities:
• Advise hospitals on service line growth, market expansion, or physician alignment.
• Advise payers (insurers) on new product designs or value-based care models.
• Advise pharmaceutical companies on drug launch and pricing strategy.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep knowledge of the healthcare ecosystem (payers, providers), financial modeling, strategy.
• Qualifications: Standard consulting background; often an MHA or MPH degree is valued.

Job Description: Focuses on improving the efficiency and patient throughput of clinical operations within a hospital or clinic system.
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze patient flow, scheduling, and bed management in hospitals.
• Implement process improvements to reduce patient wait times (e.g., in the ER).
• Optimize clinical staffing models and resource utilization.
• Implement Lean/Six Sigma principles in a clinical setting.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Process improvement, operations management, data analysis, knowledge of clinical workflows.
• Qualifications: Often held by former nurses (RNs) or clinical managers; industrial engineering background.

Job Description: An implementation consultant who helps hospital systems implement, configure, and optimize their Electronic Health Record (EHR) systems like Epic or Cerner.
Key Responsibilities:
• Gather clinical workflow requirements from doctors, nurses, and technicians.
• Configure specific EHR modules (e.g., Inpatient, Ambulatory, Willow-Pharmacy).
• Build custom reports and workflows within the EHR.
• Train and support clinical staff during "go-live" events.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep knowledge of Epic or Cerner, understanding of clinical workflows, training.
• Qualifications: Must be certified in specific EHR modules (e.g., EpicCare Ambulatory). Often requires being a former clinician.

Job Description: A strategic consultant focused on the pharmaceutical, biotech, and medical device industries. Often focuses on R&D, commercial, or regulatory strategy.
Key Responsibilities:
• Advise pharma clients on R&D portfolio strategy (which drugs to fund).
• Develop commercialization and market-access strategy for new drugs.
• Consult on clinical trial operations and regulatory strategy (FDA).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep scientific knowledge (biology, chemistry), pharma market, regulatory affairs.
• Qualifications: PhD, MD, or PharmD is extremely common for this field.

Job Description: Advises Chief Marketing Officers (CMOs) on brand positioning, customer segmentation, and marketing ROI. Differs from an ad agency, which executes campaigns.
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct customer research (surveys, focus groups) to identify segments.
• Define the client's brand architecture and value proposition.
• Analyze marketing spend and optimize channel mix (digital, traditional).
• Advise on marketing technology (MarTech) stack strategy.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Market research, brand strategy, data analysis, marketing analytics, communication.
• Qualifications: Classic consulting or marketing agency background; MBA often preferred.

Job Description: A hands-on expert or strategist who advises clients on how to improve their performance across all digital channels (SEO, PPC, social, email).
Key Responsibilities:
• Audit a client's existing digital marketing performance.
• Develop an integrated strategy for SEO, PPC, and content marketing.
• Advise on marketing automation setup (e.g., HubSpot, Marketo).
• Analyze web analytics and provide actionable recommendations.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: SEO/SEM, content marketing, social media, marketing automation, Google Analytics.
• Qualifications: Proven track record in digital marketing; deep expertise in several channels.

Job Description: A technical specialist hired to help a client increase their organic search engine rankings. This can be as a freelancer or part of a digital agency.
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct comprehensive technical SEO audits (crawlability, site speed, schema).
• Perform keyword research and map keywords to content strategy.
• Develop and execute link-building (off-page SEO) strategies.
• Track and report on ranking, traffic, and conversion improvements.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Expert in SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, Screaming Frog), technical SEO, content strategy.
• Qualifications: Proven, demonstrable portfolio of ranking improvements.

Job Description: A specialist who advises clients on how to make their sales teams more productive. Focuses on structure, process, and compensation.
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze and redesign sales territory alignment and quotas.
• Design new sales commission and incentive plans.
• Implement and optimize CRM (like Salesforce) processes for the sales team.
• Develop sales training programs on methodology and product knowledge.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Sales operations, CRM processes, compensation design, data analysis.
• Qualifications: Background in sales, sales operations, or sales management.

Job Description: Advises corporations on their Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) strategy, metrics, and reporting. A rapidly growing field.
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct an ESG materiality assessment to identify key issues for the client.
• Develop a comprehensive ESG strategy and roadmap.
• Collect ESG data and prepare annual sustainability reports (aligned with GRI, SASB standards).
• Advise clients on net-zero goals and carbon accounting.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Knowledge of ESG frameworks (GRI, SASB, TCFD), sustainability, data analysis, technical writing.
• Qualifications: Degree in Environmental Science, Sustainability, or Finance. ESG certifications.

Job Description: A technical expert who audits client operations (factories, construction sites) to ensure they are compliant with environmental laws (e.g., Clean Air Act, Clean Water Act).
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct environmental site assessments (ESAs) for real estate transactions.
• Perform audits of facilities to check compliance with EPA regulations.
• Prepare and submit regulatory permits for air, water, and waste.
• Develop plans for hazardous waste management or site remediation.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep knowledge of environmental regulations (EPA, OSHA), technical auditing, chemistry/geology.
• Qualifications: Degree in Environmental Engineering, Geology, or Environmental Science.

Job Description: A consultant (often from a large firm like Deloitte or BAH) who advises federal, state, or local government agencies on strategy, operations, and technology.
Key Responsibilities:
• Help government agencies with digital transformation and IT modernization.
• Perform process improvement projects to increase agency efficiency.
• Manage large-scale government IT implementations.
• Help agencies with strategic planning and program management.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Knowledge of government procurement/contracting, project management, process mapping.
• Qualifications: Standard consulting skills. Must be a US Citizen and often requires a Security Clearance.

Job Description: Advises political campaigns on strategy. This includes polling, media messaging, fundraising strategy, and get-out-the-vote (GOTV) operations.
Key Responsibilities:
• Develop the overall campaign strategy and messaging platform.
• Commission and analyze polling data to gauge voter sentiment.
• Create advertising strategy (TV, digital, mail).
• Advise on fundraising operations and voter mobilization efforts.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep knowledge of the political process, polling analysis, media strategy, communication.
• Qualifications: Extensive experience working on political campaigns.

Job Description: Advises corporations, governments, or high-net-worth individuals on how to protect their physical assets (buildings, people, data centers) from threats.
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct physical security risk assessments of facilities.
• Design integrated security systems (access control, video surveillance, alarms).
• Develop executive protection plans for high-profile individuals.
• Create emergency response and workplace violence prevention plans.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Security risk assessment, knowledge of security technology, emergency planning.
• Qualifications: Background in law enforcement, military, or corporate security. PSP or CPP certifications.

Job Description: An independent consultant hired by families to help high school students navigate the college application and admissions process.
Key Responsibilities:
• Advise students on high school course selection and extracurriculars.
• Develop a balanced list of target, reach, and safety schools.
• Brainstorm and edit college application essays and personal statements.
• Provide financial aid (FAFSA) and scholarship guidance.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep knowledge of the university admissions landscape, writing/editing, mentoring teenagers.
• Qualifications: Often a former college admissions officer or high school counselor.

Job Description: Advises investors and developers on the financial feasibility, market demand, and strategic plan for new construction or redevelopment projects.
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market feasibility studies for a proposed project (e.g., hotel, apartments).
• Build complex "pro-forma" financial models to forecast project costs and ROI.
• Assist with navigating zoning, permitting, and entitlement processes.
• Advise on project financing structures (debt and equity).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Expert financial modeling, real estate market analysis, knowledge of zoning/construction.
• Qualifications: Master's in Real Estate (MSRE) or MBA in Finance; deep industry experience.

Job Description: A former industry executive or senior manager who now works for themselves, providing expert-level advice on a contract basis without the overhead of a large firm.
Key Responsibilities:
• Provide highly specialized advice in their niche (e.g., "30-year expert in medical device regulation").
• Manage their own business development, contracts, and billing.
• Often brought in by larger consulting firms as a subject matter expert (SME).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep, verifiable expertise in a niche; strong personal network; self-management.
• Qualifications: 20+ years of industry experience and a strong professional reputation.

Job Description: An employee who works full-time for one company (not a consulting firm) in a dedicated "internal consulting" or "corporate strategy" group. They run high-priority projects for the business.
Key Responsibilities:
• Lead strategic projects for internal business units (e.g., a new market entry).
• Function like an external consultant but only for one client (their employer).
• Often filled by ex-consultants from top firms (McKinsey, BCG, etc.).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Project management, financial modeling, presentation, stakeholder alignment.
• Qualifications: Typically 2-4 years of experience at a major external consulting firm.

Job Description: While not always a "consultant," this internal role is often filled by ex-consultants. Acts as the right-hand strategic partner to a C-level executive, managing key projects and communications.
Key Responsibilities:
• Manage the strategic priorities and "rhythm of the business" for an executive.
• Prepare executive-level presentations for board meetings and all-hands.
• Lead special cross-functional strategic projects on the executive's behalf.
• Act as a proxy and advisor for the executive.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Project management, executive communication, strategic thinking, discretion.
• Qualifications: MBA and/or background in management consulting or investment banking.

Job Description: A strategy consultant (often from a "Big 3" firm) who works directly for a Private Equity fund, helping them conduct commercial due diligence on acquisition targets.
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct rapid, high-stakes commercial due diligence on potential acquisitions.
• Build models to assess market size and growth potential of a target company.
• Identify key risks and upside opportunities for the PE firm's investment thesis.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: High-pressure analysis, market sizing, financial modeling, communication.
• Qualifications: Top-tier (MBB) consulting experience.

Job Description: A specialist consultant who helps two companies merge their operations after an acquisition is complete. Focuses on capturing cost savings (synergies) and integrating technology/culture.
Key Responsibilities:
• Plan the "Day 1" readiness for the merger (systems, payroll, email).
• Create and manage the Integration Management Office (IMO).
• Track the realization of cost and revenue synergies.
• Manage the cultural integration of the two merging companies.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Program management (PMP), change management, HR/IT integration, financial analysis.
• Qualifications: Consulting background with experience in large, complex M&A projects.

Job Description: A specialist who helps companies track and manage their IT hardware and software inventory to optimize costs and ensure license compliance.
Key Responsibilities:
• Implement ITAM tools and processes to track all IT assets.
• Conduct software license compliance audits (e.g., for Microsoft, Oracle, SAP).
• Identify cost savings by eliminating unused software (license harvesting).
• Manage the full lifecycle of IT hardware from procurement to disposal.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: ITAM software knowledge, license auditing, data analysis, procurement.
• Qualifications: Certifications like CITAM (Certified IT Asset Manager).

Job Description: A PM working for a consulting firm (like Accenture or Deloitte) who manages the end-to-end implementation of a large technology system (like SAP or Salesforce) for a client.
Key Responsibilities:
• Manage the entire project lifecycle (scoping, design, build, test, deploy).
• Manage the project budget, timeline, and resource allocation.
• Act as the primary liaison between the client and the technical consulting team.
• Proactively identify and mitigate project risks.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Project management (PMP), budget/risk management, communication, understanding of SDLC.
• Qualifications: PMP certification; 5+ years managing large IT projects.

Job Description: Advises clients on how to improve the overall experience of their employees, from onboarding to daily work, technology, and culture, often using "journey mapping" tools.
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct employee surveys, interviews, and focus groups.
• Create employee "journey maps" to identify pain points and moments that matter.
• Advise on improvements to technology, physical workspace, and recognition programs.
• Link employee experience improvements to business outcomes (e.g., retention).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Design thinking, survey analysis, communication, HR strategy.
• Qualifications: Background in HR, Marketing, or Organizational Psychology.

Job Description: Designs and delivers leadership training programs, often for senior executives or high-potential managers within a client organization.
Key Responsibilities:
• Design custom leadership curriculums based on client needs.
• Facilitate workshops and training sessions (in-person or virtual).
• Conduct 360-degree feedback assessments for leaders.
• Provide one-on-one executive coaching to senior leaders.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Facilitation, executive presence, instructional design, coaching, organizational psychology.
• Qualifications: Often has an executive coaching certification or an advanced degree (e.g., I/O Psychology).

Job Description: A technical HR consultant who works on configuring, maintaining, and running reports from a client's HR system (like Workday or SuccessFactors).
Key Responsibilities:
• Configure business processes and security policies within the HRIS.
• Build complex custom reports and dashboards for the client's HR team.
• Troubleshoot system errors and manage support tickets.
• Provide technical support and training to the client's HR staff.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep technical knowledge of an HRIS (Workday, SAP), report writing, logic.
• Qualifications: Technical certifications in the specific HRIS platform.

Job Description: Advises corporate treasurers on managing their company's cash, liquidity, debt, and financial risks (like currency or interest rate risk).
Key Responsibilities:
• Help clients set up a global cash management and pooling structure.
• Advise on debt issuance and capital structure strategy.
• Design hedging strategies for FX and interest rate risk.
• Advise on selecting and implementing a Treasury Management System (TMS).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Corporate finance, cash management, risk management, knowledge of TMS platforms.
• Qualifications: CTP (Certified Treasury Professional) or CFA; background in corporate treasury.

Job Description: A specialist who implements technology and processes to help clients better forecast demand and plan their inventory and production schedules.
Key Responsibilities:
• Design and implement demand planning (forecasting) processes.
• Implement S&OP (Sales and Operations Planning) frameworks.
• Configure and implement supply chain planning software (e.g., Kinaxis, O9).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Demand forecasting, inventory theory, S&OP, knowledge of planning software.
• Qualifications: Degree in Supply Chain; APICS certification is common.

Job Description: A specialist who models the financial risk of climate change on a client's assets and business model. Aligns with TCFD (Task Force on Climate-related Financial Disclosures).
Key Responsibilities:
• Model physical risks (e.g., hurricane/flood damage to facilities).
• Model transition risks (e.g., carbon taxes, shift to green energy).
• Quantify the financial impact of these risks for investors and reports (TCFD).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Financial modeling, climate science, risk analysis, statistics.
• Qualifications: Advanced degree in Climate Science, Finance, or Engineering.

Job Description: Advises government agencies on budgeting, fund accounting, and compliance with governmental accounting standards (GASB).
Key Responsibilities:
• Help government clients manage their budgets and funds.
• Ensure compliance with GASB standards and federal grant rules.
• Assist with the preparation of the Comprehensive Annual Financial Report (CAFR).
• Implement public sector ERP systems (like Oracle PS).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Fund accounting, GASB, government budgeting, federal regulations.
• Qualifications: CPA with government experience; CGFM (Certified Government Financial Manager).

Job Description: Advises corporations (not real estate firms) on how to manage their global portfolio of office space, focusing on cost savings and space optimization.
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze a client's global real estate lease and property portfolio.
• Advise on "future of work" strategies (remote vs. hybrid vs. in-office).
• Identify opportunities for consolidation and cost reduction.
• Negotiate lease renewals and manage site dispositions.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Corporate real estate, financial analysis, lease accounting, negotiation.
• Qualifications: Background in corporate real estate or finance.

Job Description: A high-level creative strategist (often at a specialized "branding agency") who helps companies define or refresh their core brand identity (logo, name, voice, positioning).
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct workshops to define a brand's purpose, mission, and values.
• Analyze the competitive landscape and define brand positioning.
• Develop the creative brief for the new brand identity (name, logo, voice).
• Create formal brand guidelines for the client to use.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Branding, marketing, creative thinking, facilitation, design sense.
• Qualifications: Experience at a top branding agency or in a corporate brand management role.

Job Description: A freelance or agency expert who manages a client's paid search advertising (Pay-Per-Click) on platforms like Google Ads to generate leads or sales with a positive ROI.
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct keyword research for paid search campaigns.
• Set up, manage, and optimize campaigns in Google Ads.
• Write ad copy and manage bidding strategies to lower CPC/CPA.
• Analyze campaign data and provide performance reports.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Expert in Google Ads & Analytics, bidding strategies, data analysis, copywriting.
• Qualifications: Google Ads certification; proven track record of managing ad spend.

Job Description: A highly technical specialist who plans and executes the complex, high-risk project of moving data from a client's legacy system(s) to a new system (like a new ERP or cloud database).
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze and "map" data fields from the old system to the new system.
• Develop scripts to "extract, transform, and load" (ETL) the data.
• Perform data cleansing and validation to ensure data quality.
• Manage the "cutover" process during the go-live weekend.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: ETL processes, SQL, scripting (Python), data modeling, extreme attention to detail.
• Qualifications: Technical background in data management; experience on large transformation projects.

Job Description: A consultant who advises law firms and corporate legal departments on the technology and process of collecting, reviewing, and producing electronic data (emails, documents) for litigation.
Key Responsibilities:
• Advise legal teams on data preservation and collection strategies.
• Manage the process of hosting data in an eDiscovery review platform (e.g., Relativity).
• Use technology (AI/search terms) to cull down large data sets.
• Manage the technical production of data to opposing counsel.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Knowledge of legal review platforms (Relativity), data processing, legal procedures.
• Qualifications: Relativity Certified Administrator (RCA) or other eDiscovery certifications.

Job Description: A management consultant (often at a specialized firm like Bridgespan) who advises non-profit organizations on strategy, fundraising, and impact measurement.
Key Responsibilities:
• Help non-profits develop their "theory of change" and strategic plan.
• Advise on sustainable fundraising and revenue models.
• Design frameworks for measuring programmatic impact and outcomes.
• Facilitate board retreats and strategic planning sessions.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Non-profit management, fundraising strategy, impact measurement, facilitation.
• Qualifications: MBA or MPP; experience in the non-profit sector.

Job Description: An independent consultant hired by non-profits to plan and execute major fundraising initiatives, such as a multi-year "capital campaign."
Key Responsibilities:
• Assess a non-profit's fundraising readiness.
• Develop the strategy and case for a capital campaign.
• Identify and research major donor prospects.
• Train board members and staff on how to make "the ask."
• Manage the campaign timeline and reporting.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Major gift fundraising, sales, relationship building, event planning.
• Qualifications: Extensive (10+ years) experience as a senior fundraiser (e.g., Director of Development). CFRE certification.

Job Description: An expert at an agency or freelance practice who advises clients on how to manage their public image, earn media coverage, and communicate with stakeholders.
Key Responsibilities:
• Develop a strategic PR and communications plan.
• Write and distribute press releases; pitch stories to journalists.
• Secure media placements (articles, interviews) for the client.
• Advise on crisis communications and reputation management.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Media relations, strong writing (AP style), communication, crisis management.
• Qualifications: Degree in PR/Comms/Journalism and strong media contacts.

Job Description: A hands-on, high-stakes consultant who embeds within a failing company to take rapid, drastic action (cost-cutting, restructuring) to save it from bankruptcy. More hands-on than a Restructuring Advisor.
Key Responsibilities:
• Embed in the client's management team (often as interim CRO/CFO).
• Identify and execute rapid cost-cutting initiatives.
• Manage weekly cash flow with extreme scrutiny.
• Negotiate with lenders and vendors to maintain operations.
• Stabilize the business for a potential sale or restructuring.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Crisis management, liquidity management, negotiation, leadership, financial analysis.
• Qualifications: CTP (Certified Turnaround Professional); extensive finance/ops experience.

Job Description: A specialist on an M&A transaction who analyzes the "people" risks. Assesses the target company's culture, leadership, HR compliance, and benefits liabilities.
Key Responsibilities:
• Audit all HR compliance policies (I-9s, handbooks, wage/hour).
• Analyze benefits and pension plans to identify unfunded liabilities.
• Assess cultural compatibility between the buyer and seller.
• Identify key talent retention risks (e.g., key leaders likely to quit).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: HR compliance, benefits (ERISA), compensation analysis, risk assessment.
• Qualifications: Senior background in HR or HR consulting.

Job Description: A consultant focused purely on process. They map a client's "current state" processes and design more efficient "future state" processes, often before a technology implementation.
Key Responsibilities:
• Lead workshops to map "as-is" business processes (using BPMN or Visio).
• Identify pain points, bottlenecks, and redundancies.
• Design optimized "to-be" processes.
• Serve as the bridge between the business users and the tech consultants implementing the new process.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Process mapping (Visio), business analysis, facilitation, critical thinking.
• Qualifications: Six Sigma certification is common; background in operations or business analysis.

Job Description: Helps clients identify and automate repetitive, manual business processes (like data entry) using Robotic Process Automation (RPA) software (e.g., UiPath, Automation Anywhere).
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze client processes to identify high-value automation opportunities.
• Design, build, and test software "bots" using RPA platforms.
• Manage the "bot" workforce and ensure their performance.
• Calculate the ROI (e.g., hours saved) from automation.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: RPA software (UiPath), process analysis, basic coding/logic, problem-solving.
• Qualifications: Certification in a major RPA tool (e.g., UiPath Certified Developer).

Job Description: A deep subject matter expert or researcher within a consulting firm who does not travel to clients, but supports multiple project teams with expert research, data, or analysis.
Key Responsibilities:
• Support consulting teams with deep, specialized knowledge in one area (e.g., "semiconductor manufacturing").
• Conduct complex literature and data research.
• Own and manage the firm's proprietary data models or knowledge assets.
• Provide "expert consultation" to traveling teams.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep subject matter expertise, research, data analysis, library science.
• Qualifications: Often holds a PhD or is a former industry veteran in a specific niche.

Job Description: A life sciences specialist who advises pharma companies on the "go-to-market" strategy for a new drug that has passed clinical trials.
Key Responsibilities:
• Develop the pricing and market access strategy (how to get insurers to cover the drug).
• Advise on sales force deployment and marketing strategy.
• Conduct market forecasting for the new drug's sales potential.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Pharma industry knowledge, market access strategy, pricing, marketing.
• Qualifications: PhD, PharmD, or MBA with a life sciences focus.

Job Description: A specialist who helps clients select and implement a Transportation Management System (TMS) to manage their freight and shipping operations.
Key Responsibilities:
• Gather client requirements for freight management.
• Lead the RFP and selection process for a new TMS vendor.
• Manage the implementation and integration of the TMS platform.
• Train the client's logistics team on how to use the new system.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Logistics processes, knowledge of TMS platforms (e.g., Oracle TM, Blue Yonder), project management.
• Qualifications: Background in logistics or logistics IT.

Job Description: Advises banks and financial institutions on their processes for managing the "risk" that their financial models (e.g., credit risk, market risk models) are wrong or misused.
Key Responsibilities:
• Help banks build a framework and policies for model validation.
• Perform independent validation of key financial models.
• Ensure the bank's MRM framework meets regulatory guidelines (e.g., SR 11-7).
• Document and report model weaknesses to the client's risk committee.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Quantitative modeling, risk analysis, statistics, deep knowledge of banking regulations.
• Qualifications: PhD or Master's in a quantitative field; experience building or validating models.

Job Description: Advises leadership teams (often post-merger or during a crisis) on how to intentionally change their corporate culture.
Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose the "current state" culture using surveys, interviews, and observation.
• Facilitate leadership workshops to define the "desired state" culture and values.
• Design interventions (e.g., changing incentives, communications, symbols) to drive cultural change.
• Measure and track the shift in behaviors over time.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Organizational psychology, facilitation, change management, communication, executive presence.
• Qualifications: Advanced degree in I/O Psychology, Org Development, or HR.

Job Description: A strategic consultant who helps clients design and improve the end-to-end experience a customer has with their brand, products, and services.
Key Responsibilities:
• Map the end-to-end customer journey (across web, mobile, call center, in-store).
• Identify pain points and moments of friction for the customer.
• Use "design thinking" to brainstorm new, improved customer experiences.
• Create a roadmap of initiatives (tech, process, people) to improve CX.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Design thinking, customer journey mapping, user research, market research.
• Qualifications: Background in marketing, UX design, or strategy.

Job Description: A very senior consulting leader (often Partner-level) who has executive oversight for a massive, multi-year, global ERP transformation project (like a global SAP S/4HANA rollout).
Key Responsibilities:
• Serve as the primary executive sponsor from the consulting firm.
• Manage the overall program budget (often $100M+).
• Own the C-suite client relationship (CEO, CFO, CIO).
• Manage multiple project managers and technical/functional tracks.
• Handle major escalations and strategic risk management.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Executive program management, budget management, C-suite communication, risk management.
• Qualifications: Decades of experience leading large-scale technology transformations.

Job Description: A senior, highly technical consultant who designs the high-level technical "blueprint" for a complex technology solution, integrating multiple systems to solve a client's business problem.
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze the client's business problem and technical environment.
• Design the end-to-end technical architecture, selecting the right platforms, services, and integrations.
• Ensure the solution is scalable, secure, and resilient.
• Create technical diagrams and documentation for the development teams.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Systems architecture, deep technical knowledge (across cloud, data, apps), communication.
• Qualifications: Senior-level technical background (e.g., ex-developer or cloud engineer). Relevant architect certs.

Job Description: A strategist who advises clients on how their company is structured and operates to deliver value. Designs the blueprint for "how work gets done."
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze a company's current operating model (structure, processes, governance).
• Design a new target operating model (TOM) aligned with the business strategy.
• Define the future governance, processes, capabilities, and technology required.
• Create the roadmap to transition from the current state to the future state.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Business architecture, organizational design, strategic planning, process mapping.
• Qualifications: MBA; standard management consulting background.

Job Description: Advises utility, oil and gas, or renewable energy companies on strategy, regulation, and market trends.
Key Responsibilities:
• Advise utilities on grid modernization and renewable energy integration.
• Model commodity pricing and market trends for energy traders.
• Assess the financial viability of new energy projects (e.g., wind farm, solar field).
• Advise oil & gas clients on energy transition and decarbonization strategy.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep energy industry knowledge, financial modeling, regulatory policy, commodity markets.
• Qualifications: Degree in Engineering, Economics, or Finance. Often an MBA or specialized Master's.

Job Description: Advises corporations on how to raise money. This includes advising on IPO readiness, optimal debt structures (bonds vs. loans), and credit rating agency strategy.
Key Responsibilities:
• Advise private companies on the technical process of "IPO readiness" (e.g., financial reporting needs).
• Advise clients on their capital structure (optimal mix of debt and equity).
• Manage the relationship and presentations with credit rating agencies (S&P, Moody's).
• Advise on debt issuance and refinancing strategies.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Corporate finance, capital markets, accounting, SEC regulations, financial modeling.
• Qualifications: Background in investment banking, treasury, or capital markets advisory.

Job Description: Advises clients on how to prepare for and recover from a major business disruption (e.g., natural disaster, cyberattack, pandemic).
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct a Business Impact Analysis (BIA) to identify critical functions.
• Write the Business Continuity Plan (BCP) and Disaster Recovery (DR) plan.
• Plan and facilitate tabletop exercises and simulation drills.
• Help clients build redundant operational and IT capabilities.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Risk assessment, emergency planning, operations, project management.
• Qualifications: Certified Business Continuity Professional (CBCP) or similar credential.

Job Description: A strategic consultant (different from the Salesforce implementer) who advises on the overall strategy for how a company acquires, retains, and interacts with its customers.
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze the full customer lifecycle, from marketing to sales to service.
• Define the data, processes, and technology required for a "single view of the customer."
• Develop strategies for customer segmentation and personalized marketing.
• Select the right CRM technology and create the implementation roadmap.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: CRM strategy, marketing automation, sales process, customer data analysis.
• Qualifications: Background in marketing, sales ops, or CRM management.

Job Description: Advises corporate legal departments on how to operate more like a business. Focuses on efficiency, technology, and cost management, not on giving legal advice.
Key Responsibilities:
• Help general counsels manage their budgets and legal spend.
• Implement new legal tech (e.g., matter management, e-billing, contract management systems).
• Design efficient processes for contract review or litigation holds.
• Develop metrics and dashboards to track the legal department's performance.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Legal industry knowledge, process improvement, project management, tech implementation.
• Qualifications: Often a former paralegal, lawyer, or law firm administrator. (CLOC certification).

Job Description: A specialist who advises retail companies on topics like store footprint, merchandising, pricing, and omnichannel strategy.
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze store performance and develop strategies for footprint optimization (closures, openings).
• Advise on merchandising and product assortment strategy.
• Design the "omnichannel" strategy (linking e-commerce, mobile app, and physical stores).
• Analyze customer loyalty data to improve retention.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Retail industry knowledge, data analysis, merchandising, e-commerce strategy.
• Qualifications: Consulting background with deep experience in the retail sector.

Job Description: A digital expert who advises clients on how to launch or optimize their online store.
Key Responsibilities:
• Advise on e-commerce platform selection (e.g., Shopify, Magento, BigCommerce).
• Optimize website conversation rates (CRO), checkout process, and user experience.
• Develop strategies for customer acquisition (PPC, SEO) and email marketing.
• Analyze web data to reduce cart abandonment.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: E-commerce platforms, Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO), digital marketing, UX/UI principles.
• Qualifications: Proven experience managing or growing a successful e-commerce business.

Job Description: Often a CPA or senior accountant at a regional firm who acts as an "outsourced CFO" or trusted advisor for many different small business clients.
Key Responsibilities:
• Provide bookkeeping, payroll, and tax services (a one-stop-shop).
• Prepare monthly financial statements and explain them to the business owner.
• Advise on cash flow management, business strategy, and tax planning.
• Help owners secure bank loans or choose software.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Full-cycle accounting, tax, communication (simplifying complex topics), business acumen.
• Qualifications: CPA license and a strong desire to work directly with entrepreneurs.

Job Description: A senior leader in the Change Management practice. Sells and oversees large-scale transformation projects, focusing on ensuring human adoption of the new solution.
Key Responsibilities:
• Lead the "people" workstream on large digital or M&A transformations.
• Sell and scope complex change management programs.
• Manage multiple teams of change consultants.
• Advise C-suite clients on communication strategy and leadership alignment.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Executive leadership, sales, change strategy, communication.
• Qualifications: 10+ years in change management; Prosci or similar certification.

Job Description: A very senior strategic consultant who maintains the holistic map of a client's entire technology, data, and application ecosystem. Ensures all new projects fit the long-term plan.
Key Responsibilities:
• Create and maintain the blueprint of the client's current and future technology landscape.
• Define the principles, standards, and guidelines for all technology projects.
• Evaluate new technologies and ensure they align with the business strategy.
• Govern solution architects to ensure their designs fit the overall plan.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Systems thinking, business architecture, technical knowledge (broad and deep), governance.
• Qualifications: 15+ years in IT; certification (e.g., TOGAF) is common.

Job Description: Advises clients on their overall User Experience strategy. Goes beyond designing a single app to define the principles and processes for how the entire company builds user-centric products.
Key Responsibilities:
• Audit the client's current UX/UI capabilities and design processes.
• Develop a strategy for a consistent, user-centric design language across all products.
• Help build an internal "Center of Excellence" for UX.
• Conduct foundational user research to inform long-term product strategy.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: UX research, design thinking, product strategy, facilitation, leadership.
• Qualifications: Senior-level background in UX research or product design.

Job Description: A specialized CPA who works on M&A transactions, focusing purely on analyzing the target company's tax compliance, risks, and liabilities.
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze the target's historical tax returns (income, sales, payroll).
• Identify and quantify potential unpaid tax liabilities or audit risks.
• Advise the buyer on the tax implications of the deal structure (e.g., asset vs. stock sale).
• Review the tax section of the purchase agreement.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Expert tax knowledge (especially corporate and M&A), accounting, risk analysis, due diligence.
• Qualifications: CPA and/or Master's in Taxation (MST); background in public accounting (tax).

Job Description: A generalist role for a consultant who embeds with a client team after the strategy is set, to help them execute the plan and manage the project.
Key Responsibilities:
• Help the client's internal team build project plans and timelines.
• Set up and run the Project Management Office (PMO) for a key initiative.
• Track progress, identify risks, and create status reports for leadership.
• Act as a "utility player" to solve problems and keep the project moving.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Project management (PMP), communication, organization, problem-solving.
• Qualifications: Consulting background with strong project management skills.

Job Description: A specialist focused only on helping clients buy (procure) transportation and logistics services, such as truckload freight, ocean shipping, or 3PL warehouse services.
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze the client's freight spending and carrier contracts.
• Run large-scale RFPs to bid out freight lanes or warehouse contracts.
• Negotiate freight rates and service level agreements (SLAs) with carriers/3PLs.
• Audit freight invoices to ensure accurate billing.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep knowledge of freight markets, transportation, negotiation, procurement.
• Qualifications: Background in logistics, freight brokerage, or procurement.

Job Description: Advises health insurance companies ("Payers") on their strategy, including market expansion, new plan design, and shifting to value-based care payments.
Key Responsibilities:
• Help insurers develop new Medicare Advantage or ACA marketplace plans.
• Advise on strategies to partner with providers on "value-based care" contracts.
• Analyze market trends and competitor strategies in the insurance space.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Deep knowledge of the US health insurance system, financial modeling, strategy.
• Qualifications: MBA, MHA, or MPH; experience working for or consulting with health insurers.

Job Description: An external expert who advises retail clients on how to reduce "shrink" (inventory loss due to theft, fraud, or error).
Key Responsibilities:
• Audit a retailer's current LP procedures, store layouts, and technology.
• Identify sources of shrink (e.g., employee theft, shoplifting, administrative error).
• Recommend improvements to technology (cameras, tags), processes (cash handling), and training.
• Develop and implement employee awareness and integrity programs.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Investigative skills, auditing, knowledge of LP technology, retail operations.
• Qualifications: Former corporate Loss Prevention Manager. LPC (Loss Prevention Certified) credential.

Job Description: A specialist (often part of a broader HR consulting firm) who focuses on writing and designing the communication campaigns for HR programs (e.g., rolling out new benefits, a new performance review process).
Key Responsibilities:
• Develop the communication strategy and key messaging for a new HR initiative.
• Write and design all employee-facing materials (emails, brochures, videos, intranet sites).
• Ensure communications are clear, engaging, and aligned with the company culture.
• Plan the "go-live" communication cascade (from leaders to managers to employees).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Strong writing and editing, graphic design sense, marketing, HR program knowledge.
• Qualifications: Degree in Communications, Marketing, or HR.

Job Description: An operational finance consultant who helps clients improve their cash flow by optimizing Accounts Receivable, Accounts Payable, and Inventory (the components of Net Working Capital).
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze the client's "cash-to-cash" cycle.
• Implement strategies to collect receivables (AR) faster.
• Negotiate extended payment terms with suppliers (AP).
• Develop strategies to reduce excess and obsolete inventory.
• Free up cash trapped in operations.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Financial analysis, operations, procurement, credit management.
• Qualifications: Background in corporate finance, treasury, or operations consulting.

Job Description: An expert in ITIL (Information Technology Infrastructure Library) framework who helps clients improve their IT support operations (like the help desk). Often implements ServiceNow.
Key Responsibilities:
• Advise clients on ITIL best practices for Incident Management, Problem Management, and Change Management.
• Redesign the client's IT help desk and support processes.
• Implement and configure ITSM software (like ServiceNow).
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: ITIL framework (Foundation or Expert cert), process mapping, ServiceNow.
• Qualifications: ITIL Certification is mandatory. Experience in IT support operations.

Job Description: Hired by city or state governments to develop strategies to attract new businesses, create jobs, and stimulate economic growth in their region.
Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct economic analysis of a region's strengths and weaknesses.
• Develop strategies for attracting businesses in specific target industries (e.g., tech, biotech).
• Advise on tax incentives and workforce development programs.
• Write grant applications for federal economic development funds.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Economics, public policy, real estate, grant writing, data analysis.
• Qualifications: Master's in Urban Planning, Public Policy (MPP), or Economics.

Job Description: Advises police departments, fire departments, and EMS agencies on operations, staffing, technology, and community engagement.
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze 911 call data and response times to optimize staffing and deployment.
• Advise on implementing new technologies (e.g., body cameras, dispatch systems).
• Facilitate strategic planning and community policing initiatives.
• Assess agency compliance with national standards and best practices.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Public safety operations (Police/Fire), data analysis, stakeholder facilitation.
• Qualifications: Often a former senior public safety official (e.g., Police Chief, Fire Chief).

Job Description: Advises established companies on how to fundamentally change their business model, often from a one-time product sale to a recurring revenue (subscription) model.
Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze the client's current business model and value chain.
• Design new value propositions and recurring revenue models.
• Identify the operational, technological, and financial changes needed to support the new model.
• Create the implementation roadmap for the transformation.
Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Skills: Strategic thinking, financial modeling (recurring revenue), innovation, business architecture.
• Qualifications: MBA; senior management consulting experience.
